features: Long lasting and continuous Glade fragrance
Simple to use with no outlets or batteries needed
Adjustable to control the fragrance intensity
Frosted Floral Cherries with notes of juicy cherry, frosted flowers and ruffled peony
Fragrance crafted by master perfumers and infused with essential oils and made without phthalates, parabens, formaldehydes
description: Product Description Enter a tranquil retreat with Glade's Floral Cherries bathroom gel, designed with a dual post system to maximize the release of its fragrance. Its 360 design and distinctive elliptical shape ensure a steady infusion of juicy cherries, peony, and white woods, evoking the beauty of blooming gardens and refreshing spring days. Adjust the lid effortlessly for a personalized level of fragrance, transforming your bathroom into a serene sanctuary with the uplifting, floral scent of Floral Cherries. Let the delicate, refreshing aroma create a peaceful atmosphere, perfect for unwinding and enjoying your own moment of calm. Ingredients 5-chloro-2-methyl-4-isothiazolin-3-one; and 2-methyl-2H -isothiazol-3-one(3:1) alpha-hexylcinnamaldehyde Manufacturer Contact Information SC Johnson Ltd., Camberley, GU16 7AJ.
